programmes.show_description: William Cornick. A clever child from a loving home, William Cornick shocked Britain when he stabbed to death his teacher in 2014. What caused his pathological hatred? S1, Ep1
Lorraine Thorpe. In 2009, teenager Lorraine Thorpe and her accomplice killed two people. Was Britain's youngest double female killer always destined to kill? S1, Ep2
Rideshare Nightmare. In 2019, after a night out with friends, student Samantha Josephson climbs into a car she mistakes for her rideshare, never to be seen alive again. S8, Ep9
Smoke Shop Fugitive. In Iowa in 2019 a shooter fires on four teenagers in a parked car and escapes with a getaway driver. Can surveillance video lead to the killer? S8, Ep10

Written in Bone. A woman's severed torso is pulled from the Mississippi River; can police identify the victim and catch her killer? Plus, a state trooper makes a grim discovery. S5, Ep9
Cold Blooded. A young woman's body is found in the trunk of a car, forensic clues lead to the killer of a 19-year-old boy and a police officer does the unthinkable. S5, Ep10
Fatal Friendship. When a land developer finds his wife missing, the FBI suspects him of the kidnapping but they must keep their options open. S5, Ep13
Death Pact. In 1990, Chicago experienced a string of bank robberies. As the 'Bearded Bandit' became more sophisticated the FBI surmised that it could be a cop. S5, Ep14
CCTV Carer And LGBT Abuse. Judge Rinder examines the case of a carer caught stealing from her elderly patient and the suspicious death of a young woman. S3, Ep6
Little Shop Of Horrors. Aspiring architect Claudette Ficik charms everyone she meets with her warm personality, but one cold February day she disappears in broad daylight. S4, Ep3
The Sweetest Man In The World. The search for a missing bus driver reveals a complicated love triangle. It leaves investigators with more questions than answers. S10, Ep7
Snatched On Camera. 19-year-old student Katie Poirier vanishes while working the graveyard shift at a gas station. CCTV footage reveals an answer - but leaves a community in fear. S2, Ep8
Almost Home. When Gayle Isleib is shot dead in 1996, police identify a co-worker. Evidence is found of stalking, plans to kidnap her, murder her husband and love poems to Gayle. S2, Ep3
Stand By Your Men. After moving to a remote Colorado town, Ron and Cynthia Phillips and their kids struggle to adjust. But their home videos mask darker impulses that lead to murder. S2, Ep6
Anything For You. In Albuquerque, Mike Snyder starts a family with his partner, capturing it on home video. But after being diagnosed with a serious illness, he vanishes. S2, Ep10

programmes.show_name: American Detective With Lt Joe Kenda
programmes.show_description: When a father of five is found dead on his kitchen floor, Det. James Colley must untangle a web of twisted relationships and bizarre fantasies to uncover the mystery. S2, Ep4
MV Bianca And Bryony Hollands. Judge Rinder examines a police attempt to intercept a record-breaking shipment of cocaine. Plus, he looks at a drunk-driving incident. S3, Ep7
It Looks Like You. When an innocent woman in a quiet town is shot in broad daylight, detectives act to find her killer. Can video surveillance reveal what happened? S6, Ep12
'Til The Wheels Fall Off. In Oklahoma, a drug suspect sparks a perilous chase. In Michigan, a gunman fires on police, and in Missouri, a sting unravels when the suspect bolts. S6, Ep2
Rage Loves Company. A woman bites another driver. A young woman takes evasive manoeuvres to survive a road-raging driver. Motorists fight in a drive-thru. S2, Ep7
Rage-A-Holics. Good Samaritans rescue road rage victims. Californians negotiate dangerous roadways. A man defends his child from a gun-toting menace. S2, Ep8

James Fairweather. 15-year-old James Fairweather terrorised a local community with random deadly attacks that left two people dead. What made him carry out such brutal murders? S1, Ep3
Kim Edwards / Lucas Markham. Teen lovers Kim Edwards and Lucas Markham were convicted of murdering her mum, Elizabeth and younger sister, Katie in April 2016. What led them to kill? S1, Ep4
The Other Man. In 2014, a student from China is found murdered in Iowa. CCTV footage points to a planned execution and it opens an international investigation. S8, Ep11
Someone You Trust. When 8-year-old Sandra doesn't return home, her family report her as missing. What police discover on CCTV is every mother's worst nightmare. S8, Ep12

Fatal Error. Tiny evidence helps bring to justice a murderer who stabbed two young women to death. Plus, the search for the identity of a woman found decapitated. S5, Ep11
Scent Of A Killer. Discover how a killer can try to cover his tracks, but evidence is hard to conceal when a special breed of investigative dog picks up the scent. S5, Ep13
Broken Trust. Greed was the main motivation for the Prince Brothers' killings, firstly for money, then to get rid of those they believed could incriminate them. S5, Ep15

programmes.show_description: Goodbye Horses. On Chincoteague Island, a young mother is murdered steps from a vacant summer home. Det. Danny Plott learns she was lured to her death by a mysterious phone call. S1, Ep5
Judge Rinder shines a light on Britain's worst crimes with unprecedented access to court records, witness interviews, and dramatic reconstructions. S4, Ep2
The Landlady. The brutal murder of an elderly landlady offers no forensic answers. Detectives try to find a lead by studying security footage of her final days. S6, Ep19
